flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Marymount Manhattan College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (48.0% → 39.7%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Marymount Manhattan College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (59.1% → 49.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Marymount Manhattan College rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($19.6k → $22.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Marymount Manhattan College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($37.4k → $41.9k).
